Year Founded: 1986 (roots as Winning Form); entered bookmaking in 2000
Company Background: South African sports betting company originating from Winning Form publishing in 1986. First betting branch opened in Durban in 2000. Operates 84+ retail branches, online platform, casino games, and international sites in Mozambique, Ireland, UK. Headquarters in Durban/Kempton Park.
Licence Details: Holds bookmaker licenses in multiple provinces including KwaZulu-Natal (e.g., BOM0097), Gauteng (e.g., JHB-082), Western Cape (e.g., 10127598-015), Eastern Cape (e.g., ECBM 012-10), Free State (FSGLA/BML/008), Limpopo (BMAKER 003-LGB), Mpumalanga (e.g., 9-2-1-00043). Primarily for retail branches; online under provincial regulations.
Welcome Bonus: R25 no-deposit free bet + 50 free spins for new customers (use promo code e.g., HOLLYBET or FWHOL); deposit match up to R3750 + 25FS + 125% in some offers. Wagering requirements apply, 18+ only.
Promo Codes: HOLLYBET (R25 free bet + 50 FS), FWHOL (similar sign-up bonus). Check site for current codes; one-time use for new users.
Slot Providers: Evolution, Pragmatic Play, Habanero, YGG (Yggdrasil), PariPlay, Playtech, Kiron, Betgames, Spribe, Aviatrix, Ezugi, Jogo Global, TVBet. Over 2,500 slots including Spina Zonke, Aviator, crash games.
Payment Methods: EFT/Bank Transfer (min R100), Ozow/Peach Payments/SID/PayU (min R5), credit/debit cards Visa/Mastercard (min R5), vouchers (1Voucher, OTT, Blu Voucher), e-wallets. Withdrawals similar, processed quickly.
Mobile App: Yes, dedicated apps for Android (APK download) and iOS (App Store: Hollywoodbets - Sport & Casino). Full features including sports, casino, live betting.
Customer Support: 24/7 live chat, email, phone (province-specific). Toll-free responsible gambling line: 0800 006 008.
Key Features: Extensive sportsbook (horse racing, soccer, etc.), 2500+ casino games, live dealer, Lucky Numbers, virtual sports, data-free mobile site/app, acca bonuses, early payouts, responsible gambling tools.
Pros: Locally licensed and trusted in SA, wide game/sports variety, low min deposits, mobile apps, fast payments, generous bonuses, 24/7 support.
Cons: Strict wagering requirements on bonuses, some payout delays reported in reviews, limited international access, geo-restrictions by province, mixed Trustpilot ratings (1.4/5).

Payment Methods: Visa/Mastercard/AmEx, 1Voucher, OTT Voucher, Blu Voucher, Ozow/Instant EFT, EFT Secure, Celbux, cash deposits, bank transfer.

- Generous multi-deposit welcome bonus up to R16k
- Wide local payment options (vouchers, EFT)

Cons:

Year Founded: 1988 (as Keith Ho Racing; rebranded to betXchange in 2002)
Company Background: Founded in 1988 as Keith Ho Racing offering local horse racing. Rebranded to betXchange in 2002, expanding to all sports betting. In 2003, acquired one of South Africa's first online gambling licenses from Gauteng Gambling Board. Operates betting shops in 5 provinces, offers sports betting, casino, lotto, horse racing. Owned by Keith Ho.
Licence Details: Licensed by Western Cape Gambling and Racing Board (WCGRB) as BetXchange Western Cape (Pty) Ltd (license number possibly 10180413/001 per reviews). Additional licenses: Gauteng Gambling Board (GGB), Eastern Cape Gambling Board (ECGB), others for physical shops in multiple provinces.
Welcome Bonus: 300% Multi Bet Bonus on sports accumulators (min 2 selections at 0.2 odds each, max boost to 300%, up to R1,000,000 extra winnings). Also 100% First Loss Reload up to R20,000 (min deposit R10 within 30 days). No promo code needed.

Slot Providers: Pragmatic Play, EGT, AGT, Evolution, Spribe, Betgames, CT Interactive, No Limit City, Amatic, Tom Horn.
Payment Methods: Deposits: Wallet Doc (EFT, Capitec Pay, card), Ozow, 1Voucher, OTT, Branch Deposit, ATM, Standard EFT, credit cards. Withdrawals: EFT to banks (ABSA, Standard Bank, Nedbank, FNB), branch cash pickup, Money Market (Shoprite/Checkers).

Customer Support: Phone: 011 712 4610 / 4710 / 4716, 0861 BETXCHANGE; Email: customercare@betxchange.co.za, accounts@betxchange.co.za; Live chat (8am-6pm Mon-Sun); WhatsApp support available.
Key Features: Sports betting on 30+ sports, live betting, cash-out, bet builder, casino with 100s of slots/live games, Aviator, lotto (65+), virtuals, X-Rewards loyalty, max payout R11M, mobile apps, in-play stats.
Pros: Competitive odds, wide sports/casino coverage, unique multi-bet bonus, fast SA payments, mobile apps, 24/7 phone support, licensed in multiple provinces, tax-free winnings.
Cons: Mixed customer reviews (2.4/5 on HelloPeter), limited payment variety in some reviews, no live streaming, occasional site lag, some pages hard to access.

Year Founded: 2021 (South Africa operations via acquisition of Betting World)
Company Background: UK-based Betfred Group, founded 1967, entered South Africa in 2021 by acquiring Betting World (Pty) Ltd, rebranded as Betfred South Africa. Expanded with over 60 betting shops, acquired Sepels Best Bets in 2022, and partnered with LottoStar. Operates online sportsbook, casino, lotto, and esports betting.[Betfred About](https://betfred.co.za/page/about), [Betfred Group](https://www.betfredgroup.com/about-us/)
